Let me verify all the files are in place:
All 9 files are in place. Here's a concise summary of what was built:

---

## OceanIndex — Marine Biology Reference Portal

A high-density, institutional-grade marine biology reference site with **6 HTML pages**, a shared stylesheet, and a JavaScript module.

### Files Written

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `index.html` | Home: featured species hero (Whale Shark), live-filtering taxonomy quick-search widget, recently-added 6-card species grid, portal nav cards, site-stats banner |
| `taxonomy.html` | **Three-panel taxonomy browser** — collapsible tree sidebar, paginated species table, and the animated specimen detail panel (right rail) |
| `habitat.html` | World ocean basin SVG map with 6 clickable polygon regions, depth-zone toggle strip, species overlay legend, basin tally |
| `publications.html` | Sortable publications table (12 real citations), faceted filter sidebar with year slider, phylum checkboxes & OA toggle, inline abstract expansion |
| `conservation.html` | Dashboard: stacked IUCN status bar chart, 12 taxonomic-order cards with SVG sparklines, 4 class trend charts, threat-level summary table |
| `field-guide.html` | Masonry card grid (12 entries), each with SVG silhouette, morphology data, IUCN pill, habitat tags, depth-range strip |
| `css/style.css` | Full shared stylesheet — CSS variables, IBM Plex Mono, IUCN color tokens, 12-column grid, responsive breakpoints, all component styles |
| `js/main.js` | Taxonomy panel slide animation, tree expand/collapse, quick-search autocomplete, publications sort/filter/abstract, habitat map clicks, field guide filter, SVG sparkline renderer |
| `site_intent.json` | Machine-readable concept description |

### Key Animation Implemented
**`specimen-panel-slide`** on `taxonomy.html`: clicking any `.species-list-row` injects specimen data and adds `.panel-open` to `.specimen-detail-panel`, triggering `transform: translateX(100%) → translateX(0)` over **600ms** with `cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)`. The panel is absolutely positioned inside the clipping `.tax-rail` container — zero layout shift, no scroll, fully in-viewport throughout the transition.

## OceanIndex — Marine Biology Reference Portal

A high-density, institutional-grade marine biology reference site with **6 HTML pages**, a shared stylesheet, and a JavaScript module.

### Files Written

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `index.html` | Home: featured species hero (Whale Shark), live-filtering taxonomy quick-search widget, recently-added 6-card species grid, portal nav cards, site-stats banner |
| `taxonomy.html` | **Three-panel taxonomy browser** — collapsible tree sidebar, paginated species table, and the animated specimen detail panel (right rail) |
| `habitat.html` | World ocean basin SVG map with 6 clickable polygon regions, depth-zone toggle strip, species overlay legend, basin tally |
| `publications.html` | Sortable publications table (12 real citations), faceted filter sidebar with year slider, phylum checkboxes & OA toggle, inline abstract expansion |
| `conservation.html` | Dashboard: stacked IUCN status bar chart, 12 taxonomic-order cards with SVG sparklines, 4 class trend charts, threat-level summary table |
| `field-guide.html` | Masonry card grid (12 entries), each with SVG silhouette, morphology data, IUCN pill, habitat tags, depth-range strip |
| `css/style.css` | Full shared stylesheet — CSS variables, IBM Plex Mono, IUCN color tokens, 12-column grid, responsive breakpoints, all component styles |
| `js/main.js` | Taxonomy panel slide animation, tree expand/collapse, quick-search autocomplete, publications sort/filter/abstract, habitat map clicks, field guide filter, SVG sparkline renderer |
| `site_intent.json` | Machine-readable concept description |

### Key Animation Implemented
**`specimen-panel-slide`** on `taxonomy.html`: clicking any `.species-list-row` injects specimen data and adds `.panel-open` to `.specimen-detail-panel`, triggering `transform: translateX(100%) → translateX(0)` over **600ms** with `cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)`. The panel is absolutely positioned inside the clipping `.tax-rail` container — zero layout shift, no scroll, fully in-viewport throughout the transition.
